item.title: Junior Staff Post
item.content:encoded:
Currently, you have an unsourced image within your article. Please source this image by replying to the sent PM and/or this post within 48 hours or it will have to be deleted. Also, make sure the image complies with the SCP Wiki's CC-BY-SA 3.0 license by following this handy guide, otherwise it will have to be deleted.

48 hours have elapsed, and thus, the image(s) have been removed. Please PM with the source if you wish to have them restored or if you have any questions. Thank you.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Edits made! This was my first SCP and the forums didn't suggest much, so I'm excited that you like it!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I like this article, and the clinical tone is 100% perfect for almost all of the article, but I strongly suggest reformatting the Interview into a

Sort of
Text box
Formatting
Like this

rather than its current format.

Beyond that, the only thing that bugs me is the redacting of the interviewer and interviewee, to which I recommend replacing the "█████"s with actual names, be they meaningful or made up on the spot.

Good luck!
